narrative:
Truro-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 104 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
